untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental analysis inputs (identifiable catalyst: new product/management/industry change within 9 months, and shares outstanding < 22 million) which are NOT available in the allowed technical indicator set. These require external fundamental data feeds and event detection systems not present in the price/volume/technical indicator universe.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using technical proxies: (1) 'New 26-week high' approximated as close > dc_upper (52-period Donchian Channel upper band); (2) 'Volume confirmation > 15-day avg × 1.3' approximated as volume > vol_ratio_20 (20-day volume ratio); (3) 'Price closes below 15-day MA' approximated as close < sma_15; (4) Stop loss at -12% from entry preserved as return threshold. However, the core catalyst and share count filters cannot be implemented without fundamental data sources. This rule requires a hybrid technical-fundamental architecture to function as intended.
